template.name: allocation_batch_header
template.description: Record the arrival of an allocation file by debiting the permanent Clearing Total (10101) and crediting a per-file Allocation Clearing instance (10104) for the file total. The per-file 10104 credit balance is drawn down to zero as detail lines (T5103) are loaded.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification: Clearing Total (10101) debit balance increases and per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: An allocation file arrives and passes validation. Fires once per allocation file before any detail line events (T5103) for that file.

ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the batch header establishes the per-file allocation clearing balance under 10104.

accounting_treatments.description: Establish the per-file allocation clearing balance by transferring the file total from the permanent Clearing Total to a per-file Allocation Clearing instance; no P&L impact.

account_code_validations.description: Permanent accumulator account (Master FBO - Clearing Total) on the economic ledger; debited once per allocation file for the file total.
Per-file Allocation Clearing instance on the economic ledger; credited with the file total, then drawn down to zero by detail line events (T5103).

clearing_account_id.description: Optional identifier for the clearing account associated with this allocation file.

expected_line_count.description: Number of detail line items expected in this allocation file, for monitoring and reconciliation.

marketplace.description: White-labelled product line identifier for this allocation file (e.g. CraftNest, QuickBite, SkillForge, SeatVault, StayLocal). Optional — used for analytics and audit traceability.

payment_rail.description: Inbound payment rail that originated the deposit (e.g. ACH, WIRE, PUSH_TO_DEBIT, PAYPAL). Optional — used for analytics and reconciliation traceability.

total_amount.description: Total amount of all line items in the allocation file, as a decimal string (e.g. "333.50").

allocation_file_id.description: Allocation file reference used to create/select the per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) instance.

legs.description: Establish the per-file allocation clearing balance for this batch; detail lines (T5103) will draw this down as they load.

examples.name: batch_header_10k
examples.description: Batch header for a $10,000.00 allocation file (alloc-2026-02-23-001) linked to bank statement stmt-2026-02-23-A, with 2 expected consumer line items ($8k Customer A + $2k Customer B).
